title: Need Advice About Construction Cost Estimation for Projects
excerpt: In many projects I see, the problem come when cost estimation is not correct from beginning. Small mistake in calculation later become big issue and project go out of budget. I think doing proper Construction Cost Estima…

posts.author: AlexanderAllan (Alexander Allan)
posts.cookedHtml:
In many projects I see, the problem come when cost estimation is not correct from beginning. Small mistake in calculation later become big issue and project go out of budget. I think doing proper Construction Cost Estimation is very important to save time, money, and also to keep client trust.

I try different ways for estimation, sometimes manual and sometimes with software, but still I feel it is not always 100% accurate. Maybe I am missing some good method. How you people do your estimation? Do you use special tool, or you give this work to some outside service? I want to learn from your experience.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexanderAllan
We use EDiphi as our software.

To keep everything aligned, we use monday.com to track estimator workload, deadlines, and approvals, with automated links to both platforms for smooth navigation and better coordination - ensuring a more streamlined and controlled estimating process.
